gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 一场由误拨语音引发的跨时空浪漫，笑中带泪的治愈之旅。
gems.whyWatchEn: A hilarious voicemail meant for a deceased sister accidentally reaches a stranger, sparking an unlikely long-distance romance that is both witty and deeply touching.
gems.audience: 喜欢轻松浪漫又不失深度的观众，尤其是对非传统相遇故事感兴趣的影迷。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of quirky romantic comedies and heartfelt stories about unexpected connections, perfect for those who enjoy modern love stories with a twist.
